# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: konghq.com/v1beta1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: demo-ingress2
spec:
  rules:
    - name: example
      port:
        number: 80
      hosts: ["api.com"]
      paths: ["/kong-admin/", "/api"]
  services:
    - name: api
      port: 80 # this is not required, as Ingress will set the correct port automatically
      protocol: http
      # Targets define which service endpoints are used to load balance traffic
      targets:
        - name: demo2
          port:
            number: 9001

    - name: proxy
      port:
        number: 80
      protocol: http
      targets:
        - name: demo-service3
          port: 
            number: 7045
